scroll_found.title: Research the Boundless scroll at a Research Pedestal

subtitle.text: After the Ender Dragon falls, the End Cities open. The Shulker is the tax collector. The Elytra is the reward.

description: ▸ The Boundless scroll is the post-dragon prize.
It covers the End Cities, the Elytra,
the Shulker Box economy, and Chorus Fruit.
Everything that makes the End worth living in.
└ ✦ Elytra: in End Ship (flying hulk attached to city)
Only one per End Ship — first come first served
└ ✦ Shulker Boxes: carry inventory between worlds
Stack up to 27 additional stacks inside
Best logistics tool in the game, full stop
└ ✦ Chorus Fruit: teleports on eat (ignores walls)
Chorus Plant: farmable in End (Chorus Flower seeds)
└ ✦ End City chest loot: Enchanted diamond/iron,
saddles, horse armor — solid secondary loot
└ Purpur blocks: the city itself is Shulker territory
— do not sprint blindly into corners
└ Shulker Shell: 2 per kill at best; farm many
▸ The End is not a destination.
The Elytra was their way out.
◇ Mending + Unbreaking III on the Elytra.
You will use this for the rest of the playthrough.
